---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or an SRD-supported capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or use case

What would you like to accomplish, and who would benefit?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the desired CLI, JSON, interactive-flow, or PDF behavior.

## SRD reference

If this changes character-creation rules, identify the section in
`assets/SRD_CC_v5.2.1.pdf`. Third-party or Player's Handbook rules are outside
the current project scope unless explicitly requested.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds.

## Additional context

Include examples, screenshots, or sample JSON where useful.
